headline: CoStar Group (CSGP) Acquires 30% Stake in Wikicasa
summary: CoStar Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy according to analysts. On July 1, CoStar Group announced an investment in the Italian agent-backed real estate marketplace, Wikicasa. The transaction results in CoStar Group acquiring an approximately 30% stake in the company, with support from a shareholder base that includes […]
